summary: Completed comprehensive testing of RBAC and training features for NeuroScan AI. Backend RBAC APIs working perfectly (16/16 tests passed). Found critical registration bug (fixed). Frontend login integration failing - authentication not working properly in UI.

critical_bugs_fixed.issue: Registration endpoint was setting role to 'user' in database but returning 'doctor' in response
critical_bugs_fixed.impact: New users couldn't access doctor-level features despite UI showing doctor role
critical_bugs_fixed.fix_applied: Changed line 150 in server.py from role: 'user' to role: 'doctor'

critical_bugs.issue: Login form submission not working - stays on auth page instead of redirecting to dashboard
critical_bugs.symptoms: 401 errors on /api/auth/me, no redirect after login button click

design_issues.issue: Emergent logo/badge still visible with text 'Made with Emergent'

integration_issues.issue: Cannot test admin and training pages due to login failure

passed_tests: User registration creates users with 'doctor' role by default
GET /api/training/status returns sample counts and model status
POST /api/training/train requires admin role (403 for doctor)
POST /api/training/train fails with insufficient samples (400 for admin)
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix frontend login integration - login form not submitting properly, causing 401 errors and preventing dashboard access. Also remove 'Made with Emergent' text from landing page footer.
